title: cosmos calvus
intro: Cosmos calvus, also known as Mexican feathergrass, is a perennial grass native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cosmos calvus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cosmos calvus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile medicinal plant in traditional herbal practices.
